topic: 2026 municipal election polling and expert views
summary: Polling shows 60% certain to vote; experts expect better than 2020 but uncertain about magnitude
content:
Key polling/expert data:
- IFOP Nov 2025: 60% of French "certain" to vote (Ouest-France)
- OpinionWay Jan 2026: 69% interested in the campaign (stable)
- ELABE: 49% certain to vote in Paris (+3pp increase)
- Ifop expert Frédéric Dabi (Feb 2026): "certainly better than 2020 but hard to project because campaign hasn't reached crescendo"
- 74% don't want national parties at commune level
- The campaign is described as "nationalized" by Ifop

Political context:
- "terrible political climate" since 2024 dissolution
- Competitive races in Paris, Marseille, Lyon, Bordeaux
- New proportional list system for ALL communes
- City-wide voting in Paris/Lyon/Marseille
- 42% of mayors want to run again (comparable to 2019)
- Seniors who avoided 2020 voting due to COVID may return - key demographic factor
